title: Legacy001 ablate numeric floor categories
summary: Remove the automatic floor-derived categorical copies of numeric columns from legacy-001 while preserving the rest of the pipeline.
rationale: The root code creates many categorical features by flooring numeric columns. This may help RealMLP learn threshold-like effects, but it can also add noisy high-cardinality categorical artifacts. A direct ablation establishes whether this feature block is actually carrying signal.
implementation_hint: Start from legacy-001.py. Remove or disable only the block that creates floor-based categorical variants of numeric columns. Keep raw numeric features, existing manual interactions, count encoding, current combo target encoding, RealMLP parameters, folds, and artifacts unchanged.
expected_effect: Improve or clarify OOF AUC if floor-categorical features are mostly noise or overfit.
risk: The current root may rely on these categorical threshold features, so removing them can reduce performance.
